# Clayora
> Intimate pottery classes in small groups. A peaceful, community-based studio in Australia for all skill levels.

## About
Clayora is a pottery teaching studio in Australia. We run small-group classes in a calm, welcoming environment — no experience needed. Our 6-week programme covers wheel throwing and handbuilding, with experienced instructors guiding every step.

## Programme
- Format: 6-week journey, two hours per session each week
- Price: AUD $300 per person for the complete programme
- Group size: Small, intimate groups
- Skill level: All levels welcome — complete beginners included
- Materials and equipment provided

## Sessions
- Morning: 10:00am – 12:00pm
- Evening: 6:00pm – 8:00pm
- Available Monday through Sunday

## What you make
Students work on handbuilt and wheel-thrown pieces throughout the programme. All pieces created belong to the student to keep.

## Location
Australia

## Contact
- Website: https://clayora.com.au
- Email: hello@clayora.com.au

## Booking
Book a session online at https://clayora.com.au/#book
